creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
This probably also breaks

freebsd:extattr mode = secure

in the vfs_freebsd module (https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=vfs_freebsd&apropos=0&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+14.1-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html)

in samba4.

If freebsd:extattr mode = secure ist set, setting ACLs in Windows is not possible with error code "Invalid Parameter".

But it worked some time before 14.
